title: Dos and Don'ts block: public read-only render and end-to-end verification
description: Render the `dos-donts` block read-only wherever published content is displayed — the shared `PageRenderer` (used by both the admin's revision preview and the public `/docs` pages, TASK-50) — and verify the whole feature end-to-end: editor → autosave → publish → public render → search.
acceptanceCriteria: `dos-donts` renders correctly in read-only mode (via the shared `editorExtensions` with `editable: false`, same mechanism used by `Callout`/`ComponentEmbed` today) inside `PageRenderer` — variant styling, title, description, and cover (image ``, or the component-embed iframe in its read-only/live state)
The public doc page (`/docs/:sectionSlug/:pageSlug`) shows `dos-donts` blocks with correct visual distinction between `do` and `dont`
A page containing a `do` with an image cover, a `dont` with a component-embed cover, and a `do` with no cover — round-trips correctly through save → publish → public view logged out
The block's title/description text is findable via `search.query` after publish (confirms TASK-71's FTS extraction end-to-end, not just at the unit level)

steps.details: Verify the `DosDonts` NodeView already behaves correctly with `editable: false` (same check Callout/ComponentEmbed already do internally) inside `PageRenderer`/`RevisionSnapshotPreview` — no separate renderer needed since `PageRenderer` reuses `editorExtensions`.
Component-embed-as-cover must render the same way the standalone `component-embed` block already does in the public context (TASK-50) — same iframe, same states.

Build server+admin, run against a temp DB: create a page, insert the three `dos-donts` variants described in the acceptance criteria, publish, view logged out on `/docs/...`, confirm rendering; hit `search.query` with distinctive text from the description and confirm the page is found.
`pnpm lint` / `pnpm typecheck` / `pnpm test` (serialized, per the known parallel preview-kit flake) all green before considering Fase 8 complete.

technicalNotes: This task closes Fase 8 — treat any gap found here (e.g. cover not rendering in the public context) as blocking, not polish, mirroring the review discipline used for TASK-60's setup doc.
